title: ISRO Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ISRO Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
ISRO Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
